meta.title: Masaar — Your path to jobs and promotions at Saudi Arabia's top firms
meta.description: Instead of applying into the void, reach decision-makers directly, see your CV competitiveness score for each role, and build a certifications roadmap with Hadaf reimbursement.

hero.title: Be known before you apply.
hero.subtitle: Most roles at PIF, Aramco and NEOM are filled through referrals before they're ever posted. Masaar connects you directly to decision-makers, scores your CV for each role, and builds your certifications roadmap.
hero.trust: Join professionals targeting PIF, Aramco, NEOM, McKinsey and the ministries

score.title: Your CV competitiveness score — for one specific role at a time
score.body: You're not a single number. You may be strong for Investment Analyst and weak for Senior Portfolio Manager. Masaar scores you per role — and, more importantly, shows what raises it.
score.note: Deliberately conservative — better to under-promise than to inflate.

features.title: Everything you need to move with confidence
features.paths_body: Paths built from your background — like "Investment Analyst at PIF" or "Strategy Consultant at McKinsey".
features.certs_body: Certifications intelligently ordered, with cost and which ones Hadaf reimburses ~50% of — most people don't know this exists.
features.targets_body: We identify the right Directors and VPs, and show whether they're already in your network or need a connection request.
features.messages_body: Messages ready to send on LinkedIn, written in your tone, with a simple tracker for who you've contacted and who replied.

contacts.title: Two contact surfaces — each with a job to do
contacts.targets_body: Decision-makers in the actual role (Directors, VPs) — strategic, relationship-driven outreach.
contacts.hr_body: A shared database we build and maintain of recruiters — the formal gateway for applications.

pricing.title: One-time. No subscription.
pricing.subtitle: Pay once via mada or Apple Pay and unlock your full dashboard.
pricing.guarantee: Secure payment via Moyasar · mada, Apple Pay & cards · dashboard unlocks instantly

cta.title: Stop applying into the void.
cta.body: Know your real competitiveness, and reach the people who actually decide.

footer.tagline: Masaar — your career path, made clear.

problem.title: You send hundreds of applications — and hear nothing
problem.body: ATS systems filter out most CVs before a human sees them, and the best roles at top firms are filled through referrals before they're ever posted. The result: months of waiting, for nothing.

how.title: From your CV to your opportunity in four steps
how.step1b: Upload your CV and answer a few quick questions about your goal and target companies.
how.step2b: We score your competitiveness for each role — and show exactly what raises it.
how.step3b: Career paths, a Hadaf-reimbursable certifications roadmap, and the right decision-makers.
how.step4b: Ready-to-send messages in your voice to reach who decides — and a tracker for who you've contacted.

hadaf.title: Get ~50% of your certification cost back via Hadaf
hadaf.body: The Human Resources Development Fund (Hadaf) reimburses about half the cost of accredited professional certifications. We show which certs in your roadmap qualify, how much you get back, and how.
hadaf.point1: We flag which certs in your path qualify
hadaf.point2: We compute the net cost after reimbursement
hadaf.point3: We order them by impact on your score

testimonials.title: From 'no reply' to real interviews
testimonials.q1: I raised my score from 61 to 84 for a PIF role in two weeks after rewriting my bullets. I got three replies.
testimonials.q2: First time I understood why my CV is strong for one role and weak for another. Reaching managers directly changed everything.
testimonials.q3: The Hadaf roadmap saved me thousands of riyals, and I knew exactly who to contact instead of applying into the void.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Is it one-time or a subscription?
faq.a1: One-time only. Pay once and get your full dashboard — no recurring fees.
faq.q2: How is the competitiveness score calculated?
faq.a2: We weigh education, experience, employer prestige, skills, and how well your achievements are written — per specific role — and show what raises it. Deliberately conservative so you can trust it.
faq.q3: Do you message people on LinkedIn for me?
faq.a3: No. We draft the messages and identify decision-makers; you send them yourself — you're always in control, and your privacy is protected.
faq.a4: mada, Apple Pay, and credit cards via the secure Moyasar gateway.
faq.q5: Does it work if I want a promotion, not a new job?
faq.a5: Yes. Score yourself for a more senior role inside your own company and see exactly what you need to get promoted.

checkout.title: Complete your purchase
checkout.subtitle: One secure payment via mada or card. Then we start preparing your own private site right away.
checkout.notConfiguredHint: Add your Moyasar API keys to the environment to enable live payments (requires a Saudi merchant account).
checkout.paidBody: Welcome to Masaar. Your dashboard is ready — let's build your path.
checkout.failedBody: We didn't receive payment confirmation. You won't be charged for an incomplete payment. Please try again.

import.title: How to export your LinkedIn connections
import.subtitle: We need your connections file (CSV) to find the right decision-makers for you. Exporting takes a few minutes, and the file stays private to you.
steps: Open LinkedIn, click your photo (Me), then “Settings & Privacy”.
In the side menu, choose “Data privacy”.
Click “Get a copy of your data”.
Select “Connections” specifically instead of the full archive — it arrives faster.
Click “Request archive” and enter your password if asked.
Within minutes LinkedIn emails you a download link — download the Connections.csv file.
Come back to Masaar and upload the file here.
import.note: Note: the file may have a few descriptive rows at the top — don't worry, we handle those automatically.
import.privacy_body: We use the file only to match decision-makers to your goal, and never share it. You can delete it anytime.
import.upload_hint: Drag the file here or click to choose · CSV only
